step_rationale: Cardiac/muscle E3 ligase elevated in myocardial injury.
mechanism: TRIM54 is a cardiac-specific TRIM family E3 ligase upregulated during myocardial ischemia and necrosis in acute myocardial infarction.

references.title: Circulating E3 ligases are novel and sensitive biomarkers for diagnosis of acute myocardial infarction.
